site.title: Noorjax Consulting
site.description: Simulation consulting for governments, industry, and organizations — specializing in AnyLogic, discrete events, agent-based modeling, and system dynamics.

hero.headline: Simulate Before You Decide
hero.description: We build simulation models for governments, industry, and organizations to test policies, optimize operations, and make confident decisions — before committing real resources.

howWeWork.title: How We Work
howWeWork.subtitle: A structured approach to delivering simulation projects that drive measurable outcomes.

services.title: Industries & Applications
services.subtitle: We apply simulation across a wide range of industries and domains, combining discrete events, agent-based modeling, and system dynamics methodologies.

pricing.title: Engagement Models
pricing.subtitle: Flexible pricing structures designed to match the scope and complexity of your project.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Founded in 2017, Noorjax Consulting partners with organizations worldwide to transform complex challenges into actionable insights through simulation.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Ready to explore how simulation can support your next decision? We'd like to hear from you.
contact.freeHelpDescription: Read our article on how to get free help with your simulation models.
contact.calendlyDescription: If you want to develop a project, book a meeting directly using Calendly.
contact.eResidencyText: Noorjax Consulting is a company based in Tallinn, Estonia thanks to the E-Residency program
contact.erhubText: e-Residency Hub is the partner for the virtual address in Estonia and accounting services.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Technical insights, project highlights, and perspectives from the simulation industry.
blog.youtubeDescription: Looking for more? Our YouTube channel features AnyLogic tutorials, project walkthroughs, and simulation tips. Subscribe to stay up to date when new content is released.

courses.title: Training & Courses
courses.subtitle: Develop your simulation expertise with our structured AnyLogic courses — available on-site, online, or as private training.
